inputs.label: Total Floor Area
inputs.businessContext: The total area of the floor to be covered with underlayment, measured in square feet.

inputs.label: Roll Length
inputs.businessContext: The length of a single roll of underlayment, in feet.

inputs.label: Roll Width
inputs.businessContext: The width of a single roll of underlayment, in feet.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: The percentage of additional material needed to account for cuts, fitting, and waste.

inputs.label: Price per Roll
inputs.businessContext: The cost of one roll of underlayment in US dollars.

outputs.primary: You need approximately ${exactRolls} rolls (always round up to the next whole roll) for a total cost of $${totalCost} (actual cost will be higher after rounding up).
breakdown: One roll covers ${rollArea} sq ft (${rollLength} ft × ${rollWidth} ft).
Adjusted area with ${wasteFactor}% waste: ${neededArea} sq ft.
Exact number of rolls required (before rounding up): ${exactRolls}.
Total cost based on exact rolls: $${totalCost} (round up for purchase).
